one_law: One UP-DR plan = one CLOUD-SEC row · one CF tick = one row · Supabase proof gate

upgrade_plans.title: Claim hygiene — install/PyPI
upgrade_plans.goal: Eval page and PyPI probe agree — no false install promise
upgrade_plans.done_when: probe_sourcea_boot_pypi_v1.py ok OR eval copy says GitHub clone pending
upgrade_plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/probe_sourcea_boot_pypi_v1.py --json && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/eval --marker "sourcea-boot" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count
upgrade_plans.client_demo: Open /eval — show install line matches live PyPI or honest GitHub fallback

steps.title: Fix public install/package claim vs PyPI reality

upgrade_plans.title: Live demo — Forge Terminal
upgrade_plans.goal: Terminal shows online send path OR clear offline + forge@sourcea.app fallback
upgrade_plans.done_when: Terminal page markers present; health/send path returns ok or offline banner
upgrade_plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/sourcea/forge/terminal --marker "Forge Terminal" --marker "data-sa-proof-cta" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count
upgrade_plans.client_demo: Send one prompt on terminal — response or explicit offline state

steps.title: Forge Terminal: fix Connecting… or show honest offline state

upgrade_plans.title: Lead capture — intake submit

upgrade_plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_mvp_intake_proof_v1.py --json && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count

steps.title: Verify intake submit: store lead + confirmation + notification

upgrade_plans.title: Buyer path — primary CTA + hero
upgrade_plans.goal: Homepage hero primary CTA = Request a 48-hour build; secondary See proof · Hero matches research §10 headline + subheadline
upgrade_plans.done_when: Homepage has data-sa-primary-cta marker linking to /start or /offer · Homepage contains Proof-backed MVPs and acquisition systems, shipped fast
upgrade_plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/ --marker "Request a 48-hour build" --marker "See proof" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/ --marker "Proof-backed MVPs" --marker "acquisition systems" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count
upgrade_plans.client_demo: 10-second test: visitor names paid path without reading nav · Read hero — ICP clear in one breath

Homepage copy upgrade: proof-backed MVPs headline

upgrade_plans.title: Commercial ladder — pricing
upgrade_plans.goal: One ladder: 48h $1.5K–$5K · custom $3K–$10K · support from $2K/mo · /pricing returns 200 and nav Pricing link resolves
upgrade_plans.done_when: pricing.html offer.html start.html share same tier copy hash · curl 200 on /pricing and validate-sourcea-contract-pages or link check PASS
upgrade_plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/pricing --marker "$1,500" --marker "$5,000" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/offer --marker "48-hour" --marker "$1,500" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && curl -fsS -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://sourcea.app/pricing | grep -q 200 && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count
upgrade_plans.client_demo: Tab three pages — pricing matches · Click nav Pricing — page loads

steps.title: Pricing page route reliability (200 + linked from nav)

upgrade_plans.title: Proof readability
upgrade_plans.goal: Live receipt page adds plain-English what-this-proves strip
upgrade_plans.done_when: GET /sourcea/proof/live JSON + human strip on proof page
upgrade_plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && curl -fsS https://sourcea.app/sourcea/proof/live | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d.get('ok') or d.get('verdict')" && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/proof --marker "What this proves" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count
